gameDescription.mainText: Super Mario Wonder is a groundbreaking new entry in the Super Mario series that introduces the Wonder Flower, a mysterious item that transforms the Flower Kingdom in unexpected ways. Play as Mario, Luigi, Princess Peach, Princess Daisy, Toad, or Yoshi as you navigate through this magical world filled with surprises at every turn.

highlights.title: Wonder Effects
highlights.text: The Wonder Flower transforms the world in unpredictable ways - pipes might come alive, the terrain could flip upside down, or you might even turn into a Goomba!

highlights.title: Multiple Playable Characters
highlights.text: Choose from a variety of characters, each with their own unique abilities and play styles to tackle the challenges of the Flower Kingdom.

highlights.title: Badge System
highlights.text: Equip special badges to gain new abilities like the Parachute Cap or Wall-Climb Jump to customize your playstyle and overcome obstacles.

features.title: Wonder Flower Transformations
features.description: Experience mind-bending transformations that completely change how levels play. Watch as pipes come to life, gravity shifts, or even transform into a Goomba!

features.title: Elephant Mario
features.description: Transform into Elephant Mario with the new Elephant Fruit power-up. Use your trunk to spray water, grab items, and smash through obstacles with ease.

features.title: Badge System
features.description: Customize your abilities with the new Badge system. Equip badges to gain special powers like wall-jumping, higher jumps, or even starting levels with power-ups.

features.title: Talking Flowers
features.description: Meet the quirky talking flowers that inhabit the Flower Kingdom. They'll provide hints, challenges, and plenty of personality throughout your adventure.
